project.name: TAJIRI
project.description: Tanzanian-born digital social platform for connection, content, and economic empowerment. Combines social networking, media, messaging, and digital services for Tanzania and Africa.
project.vision: Tanzania's leading digital platform for social connection and economic empowerment
design_principles: Swahili-first UX (Nyumbani, Marafiki, Ujumbe, Picha, Mimi)

story_rules.required_references: Every story MUST reference both DOCS/DESIGN.md and DOCS/NAVIGATION.md. Stories are implemented separately without knowledge of other things.
story_rules.design_reference: DOCS/DESIGN.md: layout, components, tokens, overflow, touch targets (48dp min).
story_rules.navigation_reference: DOCS/NAVIGATION.md: how users reach this feature, navigation_path, parent screens.
implementation_directives: After implementing, recheck work and confirm all story business logic has been fully implemented.
Check and ensure there are no lint errors in the files touched.
story_rules.parent_child: Every story has parent_story_id: null (root) or a valid parent. No orphan stories.
story_rules.reachability: Every story has navigation_path. Use DOCS/NAVIGATION.md as source of truth for how users reach each feature.
story_rules.social_reference: Every story has social_media_reference for behavior patterns (Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, WhatsApp, etc.).

project.navigation_anchor: Splash → Home (5 bottom tabs: Nyumbani, Marafiki, Ujumbe, Picha, Mimi)

stories.title: Phone-Based Registration
stories.description: As a new user, I want to register using my phone number so that I can create my Tajiri account without needing email
acceptance: Display registration form with first name, last name, phone number, DOB, gender
Validate phone number uniqueness against user_profiles
Return success with user id and profile data
Store registered user in Hive local storage

design.layout: Full-screen registration with stepped form
design.notes: Low bandwidth - minimal assets

stories.social_media_reference: WhatsApp/Telegram phone-first signup; Instagram multi-step onboarding
stories.implementation_notes: Phone as primary identifier (Africa pattern). Support offline-first: save locally, sync when online.
implementation_directives: After implementing, recheck your work and confirm that all story business logic has been fully implemented.
Check and ensure there are no lint errors in the files you touched.

stories.title: Check Phone Availability
stories.description: As a user, I want to check if my phone number is available before registering

design.layout: See DOCS/DESIGN.md - Standard page structure, touch targets 48dp min
design.notes: Low bandwidth optimization; Swahili-first labels; Material 3

stories.navigation_path: Embedded in RegistrationScreen → PhoneStep (validation before submit)
stories.social_media_reference: WhatsApp phone verification; Telegram number check
implementation_directives: After implementing, recheck your work and confirm that all story business logic has been fully implemented.
Check and ensure there are no lint errors in the files you touched.

stories.title: Splash Screen & Auth Gate
stories.description: As a user, I want a splash screen that directs me to registration or home based on auth state
acceptance: SplashScreen checks Hive for stored user
Redirect to RegistrationScreen if no user
Redirect to HomeScreen if user exists

design.layout: See DOCS/DESIGN.md - Standard page structure, touch targets 48dp min
design.notes: Low bandwidth optimization; Swahili-first labels; Material 3

stories.navigation_path: App Launch → SplashScreen (auto-redirect based on auth)
stories.social_media_reference: All apps: splash → home or login. Facebook/Instagram pattern.
implementation_directives: After implementing, recheck your work and confirm that all story business logic has been fully implemented.
Check and ensure there are no lint errors in the files you touched.
